steps.title: Isolate the function
steps.content:
Subtract $57$ from both sides of the equation so the expression for $p(x)$ is alone.
$$p(x)=x^2-57$$

steps.title: Read the vertex value
steps.content:
The expression $x^2$ has minimum value $0$, so the least output of $x^2-57$ occurs when $x=0$.
$$0-57=-57$$The answer is B.
